programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Aircraft accident reconstruction.To recreate the events that took place just before the tragedy, the creators present the situations that preceded them.The program will also include comments from specialists.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans 2
programme.sub-title: In the footsteps of gold diggers

programme.title: Forbidden History 3
programme.sub-title: Following the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also explore conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism Jamie Theakston examines everything known about the loss of the Old Testament Ark of the Covenant and its potential locations.This decorated box, which symbolized the presence of Yahweh, was one of the main cultic utensils of the ancient Israelites.According to legends, the Ark of the Covenant was also a powerful weapon, able to wipe out large cities from the face of the earth.All known traces that could lead to this priceless item are gone.However, Jamie does not give up and sets out to look for her, among others.to Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History 3
programme.sub-title: The man in the iron mask
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also deal with conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism.

programme.title: The Sum of All Cities
programme.desc: The authors will present the history of selected cities.They will reveal what lies behind the numbers determining population, cost of living, crime rates, temperature and GDP.

programme.title: Mega Building Collection
programme.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programme.title: The Abyss: The Rise and Fall of Nazism
programme.desc: Using previously unpublished archival materials and citing historical sources, an international team of experts presents a new image of Adolf Hitler's rule.

programme.title: The Abyss: The Rise and Fall of Nazism
programme.desc: Using previously unpublished archival materials and citing historical sources, an international team of experts presents a new image of Adolf Hitler's rule.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Employees of the Customs Service and the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry form a patrol guarding New Zealand's borders.The threat to the country is the smuggling of drugs, weapons and other illegal materials.

programme.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Albert Lin explores ancient cities and learns the secrets of ancient builders.The respected scientist completed, among others:a search expedition for Genghis Khan's tomb in Mongolia.The researcher once again sets out on an extraordinary mission.Viewers will be able to watch him wander through the jungle, trying to find objects related to the Mayan settlement.As always, it is equipped with modern devices that allow you to scan the surroundings.The National Geographic envoy is not afraid of risk.He will break through untouched areas, cross wild rivers and slide down a rope into a giant cave.He will undertake all these daring feats to solve another mystery from the past.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: In their quest for world domination, during World War II, Germany constructed advanced military equipment, created deadly technologies, and built powerful defensive fortifications.Engineers working for the Nazis designed modern weapons, including those of mass destruction.The authors of the program present the most ambitious military projects.They tell the story of people working on weapons and other strategic inventions that were supposed to ensure the victory of the Third Reich.Although the Nazis ultimately lost the war, the military technologies created by their scientists proved groundbreaking.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 21
programme.desc: Reconstructions of real plane crashes.By recreating the course of events, the program's creators try to understand what led to the unfortunate events.They recreate the circumstances in which the tragedy occurred: the weather, the atmosphere on board the plane, the decisions and actions of the pilots.They also show the work of people investigating the causes of disasters and conduct a computer flight simulation.Viewers can hear various comments from specialists and testimonies of witnesses to these events.The creators of the program will prove that air accidents are often caused by human slowness and lack of imagination.Each disaster is thoroughly analyzed and the lessons learned help minimize the number of tragedies in the future.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering: Season 13
programme.desc: There are many engineering projects in the world that have been abandoned for various reasons.The creators of the program present the stories of these structures and the people who created them.Behind each of them there is a fascinating and unique story.Viewers will discover the most spectacular examples of abandoned buildings from around the globe, including an underground Nazi base in France, designed to attack London, and a secret Japanese facility.We will find out why they were created and what led to their fall.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Season 10
programme.desc: Further struggles for roadside assistance workers.During the harsh Norwegian winter, they help drivers in need.They also struggle with unfavorable conditions on communication routes.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of air accidents in recent years.Each episode will present a reconstruction of the events that led to the tragedy.The stories are supplemented by reports from experts and eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programme.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programme.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the accident of Aeroflot flight 821. The Boeing 737-500 was traveling from Moscow to Perm.There were bad weather conditions during the approach to landing.Near the runway, the machine began to climb uncontrollably, which was not noticed by the crew.The controller then ordered us to go to the second lap.During this maneuver, the jet lost lift.All people on board died.Initially, it was suspected that a faulty designed rudder had failed.However, investigators found a number of irregularities.Pilots include:they used forged documents.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans 2
programme.sub-title: Underwater Secrets of the Civil War

programme.title: Forbidden History 3
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also deal with conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism.

programme.title: Forbidden History 3
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also deal with conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism.

programme.title: The Sum of All Cities
programme.desc: Due to the fact that Stockholm is located on 14 islands connected by 57 bridges, it is called the Venice of the North.Residents feel the proximity to the water, kayaks and ferries carrying half a million passengers a day are popular.Climate change is taking its toll on the city.To combat their effects, energy for 400,000 homes is obtained from waste.The basis here is trust - children go to schools on their own, and there are no ticket checks on buses.It was in the capital of Sweden that Spotify and Minecraft were created.

programme.title: Mega Building Collection
programme.desc: More impressive buildings will be presented, which attract attention with their scale and represent engineering achievements.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures: Battle Ready
programme.desc: Profiles of engineers responsible for the construction of the most dangerous military facilities.Their works contributed to the technological revolution.The figures of Heinrich Himmler and Joseph Goebbels, who were completely devoted to Hitler, will also be introduced.The Führer assigned them the task of building the Nazi social machine.The program will also discuss the attack on the Soviet Union and the failure of total war tactics.You will be able to learn about the creation of the battleships Bismarck and Tirpitz, as well as the bunkers intended to protect submarines.In addition, the creators will talk about the conflict in the Pacific and the largest floating fortress armed with powerful guns.

programme.title: How to Lose a War
programme.desc: The situation in 1941 indicated that the Axis powers would win the war.The conflict began with a series of brilliant victories for the Germans, Italians and Japanese.Hitler managed to conquer almost all of Europe.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Employees of the Customs Service and the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry form a patrol guarding New Zealand's borders.The threat to the country is the smuggling of drugs, weapons and other illegal materials.

programme.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Albert Lin explores ancient cities and learns the secrets of ancient builders.The respected scientist completed, among others:a search expedition for Genghis Khan's tomb in Mongolia.The researcher once again sets out on an extraordinary mission.Viewers will be able to watch him wander through the jungle, trying to find objects related to the Mayan settlement.As always, it is equipped with modern devices that allow you to scan the surroundings.The National Geographic envoy is not afraid of risk.He will break through untouched areas, cross wild rivers and slide down a rope into a giant cave.He will undertake all these daring feats to solve another mystery from the past.

programme.title: The Soviet Union
programme.desc: The USSR was established 100 years ago - on December 30, 1922.The filmmakers present archival materials that help answer the question of what fueled the Soviet empire throughout the 20th century.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: In their quest for world domination, during World War II, Germany constructed advanced military equipment, created deadly technologies, and built powerful defensive fortifications.Engineers working for the Nazis designed modern weapons, including those of mass destruction.The authors of the program present the most ambitious military projects.They tell the story of people working on weapons and other strategic inventions that were supposed to ensure the victory of the Third Reich.Although the Nazis ultimately lost the war, the military technologies created by their scientists proved groundbreaking This is the story of one of the most far-reaching operations of World War II - the German occupation and fortification of Norway.It was to become an Arctic stronghold from which the Nazis could attack the Soviet Union.Hitler also drew attention to another aspect: the country's natural resources were important for another strategic goal - building an atomic war, which would ensure his victory in the war.When the Germans occupied Norway in 1940, they started building air bases, fortifications and training centers there.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation 21
programme.desc: Reconstructions of real plane crashes.By recreating the course of events, the program's creators try to understand what led to the unfortunate events.They recreate the circumstances in which the tragedy occurred: the weather, the atmosphere on board the plane, the decisions and actions of the pilots.They also show the work of people investigating the causes of disasters and conduct a computer flight simulation.Viewers can hear various comments from specialists and testimonies of witnesses to these events.The creators of the program will prove that air accidents are often caused by human slowness and lack of imagination.Each disaster is thoroughly analyzed and the lessons learned help minimize the number of tragedies in the future.
